import json, os, textwrap, re, unicodedata, math, difflib, sys, statistics

# Load the provided JSON files
quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-D3aKALkQAv6nYj9sKob7Ho-six_hadith_books.json"
with open(quran_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran_data = json.load(f)
with open(hadith_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadith_data = json.load(f)
type(quran_data), type(hadith_data), (len(quran_data) if hasattr(quran_data, '__len__') else None), (len(hadith_data) if hasattr(hadith_data, '__len__') else None)

# Inspect a few items
quran_data[0], hadith_data[0]

def normalize_ar(s):
    if s is None:
        return ""
    # remove tatweel
    s = s.replace("ـ", "")
    # normalize arabic letters and hamza forms
    s = re.sub("[إأآٱا]", "ا", s)
    s = s.replace("ى", "ي")
    s = s.replace("ؤ", "و")
    s = s.replace("ئ", "ي")
    s = s.replace("ة", "ه")
    # remove diacritics
    arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r"[\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]")
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub("", s)
    # remove punctuation and English punctuation
    s = re.sub(r"[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]+", " ", s)
    # collapse whitespace
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip()
    return s

def search_hadiths(query, topn=20):
    nq = normalize_ar(query)
    results = []
    for idx, rec in enumerate(hadith_data):
        text = (rec.get('Matn') or "") + " " + (rec.get('hadithTxt') or "")
        ntext = normalize_ar(text)
        if not ntext:
            continue
        # compute ratio
        ratio = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, nq, ntext).ratio()
        # also token overlap
        q_tokens = set(nq.split())
        t_tokens = set(ntext.split())
        if q_tokens:
            prec = len(q_tokens & t_tokens) / len(q_tokens)
        else:
            prec = 0
        if prec>0.6 or ratio>0.3:
            results.append((ratio, prec, idx, rec))
    # sort by combined metric
    results.sort(key=lambda x: (x[0]*0.6 + x[1]*0.4), reverse=True)
    return results[:topn]

query_full = "لا تُناجَ أَحَدُكُمُ أَخَاهُ فيما يُحِبُّ، وَلَكِنَّهُ يُحِبُّهُ فيما يُحِبُّهُ"
res = search_hadiths(query_full, topn=50)
len(res), res[:3][0][0:3] if res else None

for score in res[:10]:
    ratio, prec, idx, rec = score
    print(score[:3], rec.get('title')[:80] if rec.get('title') else "", " | has Matn:", bool(rec.get('Matn')))
    print((rec.get('Matn') or rec.get('hadithTxt') or "")[:200].replace("\n"," ") )
    print("----")

# Build index of normalized Matn/hadithTxt
norm_texts = []
for i, rec in enumerate(hadith_data):
    text = (rec.get('Matn') or "") + " " + (rec.get('hadithTxt') or "")
    norm_texts.append(normalize_ar(text))

# search for keywords
keywords = ["تناج", "يتناجى", "تناجى", "اثنان", "الثالث", "يحزنه", "لا يتناجى اثنان"]
hits = []
for i, ntext in enumerate(norm_texts):
    if all(k in ntext for k in ["يتناجى","اثنان","الثالث"]):
        hits.append(i)
len(hits), hits[:10]

for idx in hits[:6]:
    rec = hadith_data[idx]
    text = (rec.get('Matn') or rec.get('hadithTxt') or "")
    print(idx, rec.get('title')[:70] if rec.get('title') else "", "| has Matn:", bool(rec.get('Matn')))
    print(text[:400].replace("\n"," "))
    print("---\n")

# Search for hadith "لا يؤمن أحدكم حتى يحب لأخيه ما يحب لنفسه" in DB by pattern
cand_phrases = ["لا يؤمن أحدكم حتى يحب لأخيه ما يحب لنفسه", "لا يؤمن احدكم حتى يحب لاخيه ما يحب لنفسه", "لا يؤمن أحدكم"]
cands = []
for i, rec in enumerate(hadith_data):
    text = (rec.get('Matn') or rec.get('hadithTxt') or "")
    ntext = normalize_ar(text)
    if "لا يؤمن احدكم حتى يحب لاخيه ما يحب لنفسه" in ntext:
        cands.append(i)
len(cands), cands[:10]

for idx in hits:
    rec = hadith_data[idx]
    print(idx, rec.get('title')[:70] if rec.get('title') else "", "| has Matn:", bool(rec.get('Matn')))
    print((rec.get('Matn') or rec.get('hadithTxt') or "")[:220].replace("\n"," "))
    print("---")

err_full = "لا تُناجَ أَحَدُكُمُ أَخَاهُ فيما يُحِبُّ، وَلَكِنَّهُ يُحِبُّهُ فيما يُحِبُّهُ"
err_n = normalize_ar(err_full)
candidates = {
    "bukhari_najwa": hadith_data[6177]['Matn'],
    "muslim_najwa1": hadith_data[13177]['Matn'],
    "muslim_najwa2": hadith_data[13179]['Matn'],
    "muslim_najwa3": hadith_data[13180]['Matn'],
    "bukhari_love": hadith_data[14]['Matn'],
    "muslim_love": hadith_data[7552]['Matn'],
}
def sim(a, b):
    an = normalize_ar(a)
    bn = normalize_ar(b)
    ratio = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, an, bn).ratio()
    # token F1. We'll define F1 as harmonic mean of precision and recall for tokens
    at = an.split()
    bt = bn.split()
    aset = set(at); bset = set(bt)
    if len(aset)==0 or len(bset)==0:
        f1=0
    else:
        inter = len(aset & bset)
        prec = inter/len(aset)
        rec = inter/len(bset)
        f1 = 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec) if (prec+rec)>0 else 0
    return ratio, f1, aset & bset, an, bn

for name, text in candidates.items():
    r, f1, inter, a, b = sim(err_full, text)
    print(name, r, f1, inter)
    print("Candidate:", text)
    print("---")
